lint.note: Repository lint command in .factory/services.yaml is a no-op placeholder.

build.note: Additional validation run per repository instructions.

blockingIssues.description: src/i18n/index.ts generates zh-TW by blindly converting every zh-CN string character-by-character, which still emits invalid visible Traditional Chinese such as `钢铁意志,剑盾无双` → `鋼鐵意誌,劍盾無雙` instead of `鋼鐵意志,劍盾無雙`.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to document that zh-TW is generated in memory at module init from zh-CN via src/i18n/index.ts, rather than imported from a checked-in locales/zh-TW.ts snapshot.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the skill to describe the current runtime zh-TW generation model and stop instructing workers to regenerate or hand off a checked-in src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.ts file.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix deleted src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.ts and now derives zh-TW inside src/i18n/index.ts, but .factory/skills/i18n-worker/SKILL.md still tells workers to regenerate and report that file.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align example translation keys with the implemented camelCase key naming convention (for example `menu.newGame` instead of `menu.new_game`) to avoid false-negative manual validation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-contract.md still references snake_case keys like `menu.new_game`, while src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts and the implementation use camelCase keys such as `menu.newGame`.
